---
title: "Q7 — Battery lifetimes: P(40 < mean < 48)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Q7
mu <- 45; sigma <- 18; n <- 50
se <- sigma/sqrt(n)
z1 <- (40 - mu)/se; z2 <- (48 - mu)/se
p_value <- pnorm(z2) - pnorm(z1)
z1; z2; p_value

xs <- seq(-4,4,length=400); ys <- dnorm(xs)
plot(xs, ys, type='l', main='Q7: P(40 < mean < 48)', ylab='Density')
polygon(xs[(xs>z1 & xs<z2)], ys[(xs>z1 & xs<z2)], col=rgb(0,1,0,0.3))
```
